data.title: Apple iPhone 16 Sees 20% Sales Surge in China, But AI Absence Prompts Early Price Cuts
data.description: Apple's iPhone 16 sales soar 20% in China debut, boosted by stimulus plans and premium models. Challenges from domestic competition and AI delay.

data.title: Pharmacy Retailer CVS Health Backs Away From Annual Forecast, Names New CEO
data.description: CVS Health replaces CEO Karen Lynch with David Joyner as the company struggles with lower earnings projections and rising medical costs. Q3 2024 results, including a $1.1 billion charge, are expected to miss Wall Street expectations.

data.description: SOBR stock surges as company cancels public offering. Stock jumped premarket.
